entities.name: cleanup-root
entities.context: Command that moves unprotected items to Inbox/ and logs operations to N5/logs/.cleanup_log.jsonl

entities.name: inbox-process
entities.context: Analyzes and routes files that were moved to Inbox/ by cleanup-root

entities.name: inbox-review
entities.context: Generates human review document from processed inbox items

entities.name: Clearinghouse Workflow
entities.context: Three-step workflow: cleanup-root → inbox-process → inbox-review, scheduled daily at 11pm ET

entities.name: N5
entities.context: V's knowledge/operations system; hosts logs, configs, and automation scripts

entities.name: Inbox
entities.context: Staging directory at /home/workspace/Inbox/ where unprotected root items are routed for processing

entities.name: Protected Directories
entities.context: Directories exempt from cleanup-root moves; only protected directories remain at workspace root after cleanup

entities.name: .cleanup_log.jsonl
entities.context: JSONL log file at N5/logs/ recording all cleanup-root operations with timestamps, paths, status, and metadata

relationships.context: Moves all unprotected root items into Inbox/ with timestamped filenames
Logs all move operations, errors, and metadata to this JSONL file
Step 1 of the three-step clearinghouse workflow
Step 2 — analyzes and routes files after cleanup-root
Step 3 — generates human review document after inbox-process
Workflow is part of V's N5 operations system
Skips protected directories; only moves unprotected items
